title: Vodarevu Beach
tagline: Vodarevu Beach — beach town of Andhra Pradesh

overview.short: Vodarevu Beach is located about 6 km from Chirala on the East coast of Bay of Bengal.
overview.description: Vodarevu Beach is located about 6 km from Chirala on the East coast of Bay of Bengal. It is situated in Bapatla district of Andhra Pradesh. Coconut trees line the shore. Vodarevu Beach is shortest distance beach from Hyderabad and Telangana Every week end lot of tourists from Hyderabad and Telangana visiting here.

topPlaces.name: Ipurupalem
topPlaces.description: Ipurupalem is a village in Chirala mandal, Bapatla district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh.

topPlaces.name: Chirala mandal
topPlaces.description: Chirala mandal is one of the 25 mandals in Bapatla district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is administered under Chirala revenue division and its headquarters are located at Chirala.

topPlaces.name: Chirala
topPlaces.description: Chirala (), is a coastal town in Bapatla district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is a municipality and the headquarters of Chirala mandal in Chirala revenue division.

topPlaces.name: Stuartpuram
topPlaces.description: Stuartpuram is a village located in the Bapatla district of Andhra Pradesh in India. It is located on the Kolkata–Chennai highway.

topPlaces.name: Bapatla West
topPlaces.description: Bapatla West (rural) is a village in Bapatla district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located in Bapatla mandal of Tenali revenue division.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vodarevu Beach?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vodarevu Beach is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vodarevu Beach?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Vijayawada Airport (91 km) and the nearest railway station is Guntur Junction (57 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vodarevu Beach?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vodarevu Beach at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vodarevu Beach?
faq.a: Stays in Vodarevu Beach start from ₹1,200 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vodarevu Beach?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ipurupalem, Chirala mandal, Chirala, Stuartpuram, Bapatla West.
